schema.description: The full contractor payment group, including associated contractor payments.

allOf.description: Base properties for contractor payment groups.

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the contractor payment group.

check_date.description: The check date of the contractor payment group.

debit_date.description: The debit date of the contractor payment group.

status.description: The status of the contractor payment group.  Will be `Funded` if all payments that should be funded (i.e. have `Direct Deposit` for payment method) are funded.  A group can have status `Funded` while having associated payments that have status `Unfunded`, i.e. payment with `Check` payment method.

creation_token.description: Token used to make contractor payment group creation idempotent.  Will error if attempting to create a group with a duplicate token.

allOf.title: Contractor-Payment-Group-Base

partner_owned_disbursement.description: Whether the disbursement is partner owned.

submission_blockers.description: List of submission blockers for the contractor payment group.

items.description: A blocker that prevents payment submission.

blocker_type.description: The type of blocker that's blocking the payment submission.

blocker_name.description: The name of the submission blocker.

unblock_type.description: The type of unblock option for the submission blocker.

check_date.description: The payment check date associated with the unblock option.

metadata.description: Additional data associated with the unblock option.

unblock_options.description: The available options to unblock a submission blocker.

selected_option.description: The unblock option that's been selected to resolve the submission blocker.

status.description: The status of the submission blocker.

items.title: Payroll-Submission-Blocker-Type

credit_blockers.description: List of credit blockers for the contractor payment group.

items.description: A blocker that prevents payment crediting.

blocker_type.description: The type of blocker that's blocking the payment from being credited.

blocker_name.description: The name of the credit blocker.

oneOf.description: Unblock option to resolve a credit blocker by submitting a wire transfer

unblock_type.description: The type of unblock option for the credit blocker

check_date.description: The payment check date associated with the unblock option

wire_in_amount.description: The amount to be wired in (decimal string)

wire_in_deadline.description: Deadline for the wire transfer to be received

wire_in_request_uuid.description: UUID of the wire in request

bank_account_last_four_digits.description: Last 4 digits of the bank account number for the bank screenshot RFI

bank_account_last_four_digits.description: Last 4 digits of the bank account number for the reverse wire

items.title: Payroll-Credit-Blocker-Type

amount.description: The total amount for the group of contractor payments.

debit_amount.description: The total debit amount for the group of contractor payments. Sum of wage & reimbursement amount.

wage_amount.description: The total wage amount for the group of contractor payments.

reimbursement_amount.description: The total reimbursement amount for the group of contractor payments.

check_amount.description: The total check amount for the group of contractor payments.

items.description: The representation of a single contractor payment.

uuid.description: The unique identifier of the contractor payment in Gusto.

bonus.description: The bonus amount in the payment.

hours.description: The number of hours worked for the payment.

reimbursement.description: The reimbursement amount in the payment.

status.description: The status of the contractor payment.  Will transition to `Funded` during payments processing if the payment should be funded, i.e. has `Direct Deposit` for payment method. Contractors payments with `Check` payment method will remain `Unfunded`.

hourly_rate.description: The rate per hour worked for the payment.

may_cancel.description: Determine if the contractor payment can be cancelled.

wage.description: The fixed wage of the payment, regardless of hours worked.

wage_type.description: The wage type for the payment.

items.title: Contractor-Payment-For-Group

schema.title: Contractor-Payment-Group

404.description:
Not Found

The requested contractor payment group does not exist. Make sure the provided UUID is valid.

schema.description:
Not Found 
  
The requested resource does not exist. Make sure the provided ID/UUID is valid.

error_key.description: Specifies where the error occurs. Typically this key identifies the attribute/parameter related to the error.

category.description: Specifies the type of error. The category provides error groupings and can be used to build custom error handling in your integration.

message.description: Provides details about the error - generally this message can be surfaced to an end user.

errors.message: The requested resource was not found.

schema.title: Not-Found-Error-Object
